title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: A modern introduction to programming with JavaScript, covering language features and best practices.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A profound novel about justice and innocence in the American South.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A fable about following your dream and listening to your heart.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship for writing better, cleaner code.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: The story of cosmic evolution and the development of science and civilization.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A shocking psychological thriller about a woman's act of violence against her husband.

title: React Key Concepts
author: Maximillian Schwarzmüller
description: A deep dive into the core concepts of React for modern web development.

title: Seven Brief Lessons on Physics
author: Carlo Rovelli
description: A beautiful and simple introduction to the wonders of modern physics.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A story of ambition, wealth, and love in the Jazz Age.

title: Designing Data Applications
author: Martin Kleppmann
description: The fundamental principles of data system design and modern architecture.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A brief history of humankind, from our ancestors to the modern world.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Explore the origin and fate of the universe in this classic science book.
